subcodes.first_line: The lights have shone forth, the mysteries have been unveiled, and the verses have descended; yet the people remain behind a manifest veil. The Treasure hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اشرقت الانوار و ظهرت الاسرار و نزلت الایات ولکن الناس فی حجاب مبین قد طلع الکنز
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @suffering and imprisonment
